definitions.text: Bright and colourless; reflecting equal quantities of all frequencies of visible light.
examples: Write in black ink on white paper.

definitions.text: The color of snow or milk; the color of light containing equal amounts of all visible wavelengths.
A person of European descent with light-colored skin.
Any butterfly of the subfamily Pierinae in the family Pieridae.
To make white; to whiten; to bleach.
